escalation.rationale: US-Iran direct military exchange with airstrikes and retaliatory attacks on US bases across Middle East significantly escalates regional conflict.

ticker_items: US launches airstrikes on Iran after helicopter crash, Iran retaliates
Iran strikes US bases in Jordan, Bahrain, Kuwait
Bulgaria, Hungary halt weapons supplies to Ukraine
Ukraine assassinates Russian general near Moscow
China-North Korea summit pledges deeper cooperation

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian forces assassinated Russian general via car bombing with IED
Series of long-range Ukrainian strikes hit military and energy sites
Ukrainian forces attack critical Russian supply lines to Crimea

middle_east.description: US launched airstrikes on Iran after blaming Tehran for helicopter crash
Iranian Revolutionary Guards conducted missile strikes on US base
Iranian retaliatory attacks on sites in Bahrain
Iranian attacks on sites in Kuwait prompting air defense response
Israeli strikes on Hezbollah targets in Lebanese city

russia.text: No point in meeting Zelensky before peace deal ready
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

observers.description: Bulgaria announced it will no longer provide weapons from army stocks to Ukraine, calling for diplomatic solution. The NATO and EU member state shifts toward neutrality while defense industry may continue private sales.

Hungary under new Prime Minister Péter Magyar halts arms supplies to Ukraine while dropping four-year veto on EU sanctions against Russian Orthodox Church head. Policy maintains delicate balance between EU relations and domestic approval.

President Xi Jinping concluded rare state visit to North Korea with Kim Jong Un, pledging deeper cooperation. China warns EU against sanctions on Chinese firms over Russia links while strengthening ties with Pyongyang.

financial.notes: Oil prices steady as US-Iran fighting muddy direction though forecast US stock draw offers support.

update_log.text: Iran launches retaliatory missile strikes on US bases in Jordan, Bahrain and Kuwait
US conducts airstrikes on Iran after blaming Tehran for Apache helicopter crash near Hormuz
Ukraine assassinates Russian general near Moscow with car bomb
Bulgaria announces end to state weapons supply to Ukraine
